title: VoiceProfile
description: A Voice Profile defining writing style and tone for AI content generation.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the Voice Profile.

name.description: Display name of the Voice Profile.

description.description: Description of the voice profile's intended use case.

tone.description: The tonal characteristics of the voice profile such as formal, conversational, or authoritative.

style_guidelines.description: Writing style guidelines that define how content should be structured.

brand_kit_uid.description: UID of the Brand Kit this Voice Profile belongs to.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Voice Profile was created.
